<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check what changed
seg_before = last_transition.before_frame.segmentation
seg_after = current_frame.segmentation

print("Before SPACE:")
for n in seg_before['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ['N', 'b', 'c', 'W', 'G', 'g']:
        b = n['boundary']
        center = (sum(p[0] for p in b)/len(b), sum(p[1] for p in b)/len(b))
        print(f"  id={n['id']} ({n['color']}): center={center}, pixels={n['pixels']}")

print("\nAfter SPACE:")
for n in seg_after['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ['N', 'b', 'c', 'W', 'G', 'g']:
        b = n['boundary']
        center = (sum(p[0] for p in b)/len(b), sum(p[1] for p in b)/len(b))
        print(f"  id={n['id']} ({n['color']}): center={center}, pixels={n['pixels']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
